title: Optimize DevOps with AI agents on Azure
summary: Learn the concepts of agentic DevOps. Next, learn how to use GitHub Copilot, Azure DevOps MCP Server, and Azure SRE Agent to accelerate delivery, automate operations, and improve reliability across your DevOps workflows.

sections.title: Optimize DevOps with AI agents on Azure
sections.summary: Learn the concepts of agentic DevOps. Next, learn how to use GitHub Copilot, Azure DevOps MCP Server, and Azure SRE Agent to accelerate delivery, automate operations, and improve reliability across your DevOps workflows.

lessons.title: Introduction to agentic DevOps using Microsoft tools on Azure
lessons.content_md:
Describe the agentic DevOps model for Microsoft DevOps Engineers, identify high-value opportunities in daily DevOps work, and define safe operating boundaries for agentic actions on Azure.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/introduction-agentic-devops-microsoft-tools-azure/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Introduction to agentic DevOps using Microsoft tools on Azure

lessons.title: Manage Azure Boards by using GitHub Copilot integration
lessons.content_md:
Manage Azure Boards by using GitHub Copilot integration

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-azure-boards-using-github-copilot/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage Azure Boards by using GitHub Copilot integration

lessons.title: Manage Azure DevOps by using MCP Server
lessons.content_md:
Use Azure DevOps MCP Server with GitHub Copilot to manage projects, work items, pull requests, and pipelines through natural language workflows.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-ado-mcp-server/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage Azure DevOps by using MCP Server

lessons.title: Optimize Azure reliability by using Azure SRE Agent
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to apply SRE (Site Reliability Engineering) principles and use Azure SRE Agent to improve incident response, reduce operational toil, and govern remediation workflows.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/optimize-azure-reliability-with-sre-agent/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Optimize Azure reliability by using Azure SRE Agent

lessons.title: Use GitHub Copilot plan mode for cloud operations tasks
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use GitHub Copilot plan mode to create structured implementation plans for cloud infrastructure changes and system administration tasks.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/use-plan-mode-cloud-ops/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Use GitHub Copilot plan mode for cloud operations tasks

lessons.title: Use GitHub Copilot for cloud operations
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use GitHub Copilot to author Infrastructure as Code templates, apply prompt engineering techniques, and generate Azure CLI and PowerShell scripts for cloud operations tasks.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/use-github-copilot-cloud-operations/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Use GitHub Copilot for cloud operations

lessons.title: Transition from traditional ops to agentic DevOps workflows
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to evolve traditional cloud administration and DevOps tasks into agentic AI workflows using agent instructions, skills, and multi-agent orchestration.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/transition-traditional-ops-agent-automation/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Transition from traditional ops to agentic DevOps workflows

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Optimize DevOps with AI agents on Azure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Optimize DevOps with AI agents on Azure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
